revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}| – {{{2}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}| – {{{2}}}}}
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}| – {{{2}}}}}
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}| – {{{2}}}}}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}| – {{{2}}}}}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}]]
{{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|talk]] | 2 = [[Special:EmailUser/User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|email]] | 3 = [{{fullurl:Special:ListUsers|limit=1&username={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [[Testwiki:User:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|Testwiki}}]] | 2 = [[Testwiki:User_talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|talk}}]] | 3 = [[Testwiki:Special:Log?type=rights&page=User:{{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{1|{{{User|{{{user|Example}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{color|#002bb8|rights}}]] }} '''·''' {{Toolbar | separator = dot | 1 = [https://github.com/{{#if:{{{github|}}}|{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}|WPAFC?tab=members }} {{color|#002bb8|GitHub}}] | 2 = [https://github.com/WPAFC/afch/issues{{#if:{{{github|}}}|/assigned/{{urlencode:{{{github}}}}}?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open|?direction=desc&sort=updated&state=open}} {{color|#002bb8|{{#if:{{{github|}}}|Assigned|Open}} issues}}] }}
